# Ivan Pozdnovskii - Web Developer

> Modern Website development with Astro, Webstudio, Webflow, and Shopify. Expert in site speed optimization, SEO, and accessibility for higher rankings.

## Contact

- Website: https://weblateweb.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/Pozdnovskii
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ivan-pozdnovskii

## Expertise

- **Astro** - Static site generation, modern web architecture
- **Tailwind CSS** - Utility-first CSS framework
- **SEO Optimization** - Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals
- **Web Accessibility (a11y)** - WCAG compliance, semantic HTML
- **Web Performance** - Optimization, lazy loading, critical CSS
- **Webflow** - No-code development
- **Webstudio** - Visual development
- **Shopify** - E-commerce development, theme optimization

## E-commerce & Shopify

- Shopify theme development and customization (Liquid, HTML, CSS, JS)
- Theme performance optimization (reducing render-blocking resources, lazy loading)
- Custom sections and blocks for store admins
- SEO for e-commerce (structured data, meta tags, site speed)
- Conversion optimization through better UX and faster load times

## Principles

- Performance-first development
- SEO-optimized architecture
- Accessibility for all users
- Clean, scalable code
- Modern web standards

## Services

- Custom website development (Astro, Shopify, Webflow, Webstudio)
- SEO optimization and technical audits
- Performance optimization (Core Web Vitals)
- Accessibility consulting (WCAG compliance)

## Thoughts (Blog)

Articles about web development:
- https://weblateweb.dev/thoughts/website-builders - Guide to choosing website builders
- https://weblateweb.dev/thoughts/best-work-clients-wont-return - Building reusable solutions for clients
